title: Create OnboardingSelfie component — face detection loop, oval overlay, auto-capture and print API call
acceptance_criteria: Injects FaceDetectorService, CameraService, KioskSessionService, VisitorService, Router, ChangeDetectorRef via inject()
Live camera feed + canvas overlay with same viewfinder sizing and mirroring as QR page (clamp(400px, min(50vh, 50vw), 800px))
On load: resets session.face to null, initialises camera, initialises FaceDetectorService, starts requestAnimationFrame loop
Each frame: calls faceDetectorService.predictWebcam() which draws oval overlay and returns base64 JPEG if face is valid
Valid face held for 2000ms continuously → captures JPEG → stores in KioskSessionService.face signal
Immediately calls visitorService.printLabel({ visitId, visitorId, badgeId, faceImageBase64 }) with data from KioskSessionService
Waits max(print API time, 2000ms), then navigates to /reception/onboarding/done
On print error: shows 'Something went wrong: [error]' and navigates to /done after 5000ms regardless
Status messages shown at 2rem bold: 'Printing a label...' while in progress, 'Label is printed successfully' on success
Bold hint 'Scan your face' at 3rem below viewfinder
Hidden camera selector UI (wrapped in @if (false)) for developer use
Cleanup on destroy: stops camera stream, disposes face detector, cancels animation frame
Uses inject() pattern, no constructor injection
No standalone: true in decorator (Angular 21 default)
completion_summary: Created OnboardingSelfie component with RAF face-detection loop, 2s hold-to-capture, print API call, error handling, and full cleanup on destroy
